quickActions.label: 🏭 Custom / ODM
quickActions.opener: We do full ODM/OEM custom hardware — enclosure, firmware, and mass production. Could you tell me roughly what product you have in mind, expected quantity, and your target launch date?

contacts.label: WeChat
contacts.value: Scan to add us on WeChat

faq.a: GMIC AI designs and manufactures custom AI voice hardware — AI voice recorders, wearable microphones, smart badges, AI scribe devices, and Bluetooth/Wi-Fi audio products. We take it end to end, from design and firmware to mass production. Tell us what you have in mind and we'll see how we can help.

faq.q: Do you offer custom / white-label (ODM/OEM)? What is the MOQ?
faq.a: Yes — full ODM/OEM is our core: custom enclosure, firmware, tuning, and mass production, all under your brand. MOQ depends on the product and complexity (typically a few hundred to a few thousand units). Tell us what you're building and your target quantity, and we'll give you an exact figure.

faq.q: Which industries / use cases do you support?
faq.a: We support voice capture across healthcare and clinical scribing, field service, sales and meetings, education, and enterprise/security — essentially anywhere speech needs to become text or action. If you have a specific use case, describe it and we'll tell you how we'd approach it.

faq.q: How long for samples / mass production?
faq.a: Timelines depend on complexity and customization, but a typical path is a few weeks for samples and several weeks for mass production once specs are locked. Share your project and timeline and we'll give you a realistic schedule.

faq.q: How do I get in touch / request a quote?
faq.a: The fastest way is to leave your email here with a short note on what you need — our ODM team will follow up with details and a quote. You can also reach us directly via WhatsApp, email (trigg@gmic.ai), or book a call using the buttons above.
